name: TWO HARBORS INVESTMENT CORP.
business: Two Harbors Investment Corp. is an internally-managed real estate investment trust that invests in, finances and manages mortgage servicing rights (MSR) and Agency residential mortgage-backed securities (RMBS). Through its operational platform RoundPoint Mortgage Servicing LLC, it is one of the largest servicers of conventional loans in the country. Its common stock is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol TWO.

exposures.sentence: We seek to leverage our core competencies of understanding and managing interest rate and prepayment risk to invest in our portfolio of MSR and Agency RMBS.
We are highly dependent on information technology, and system failures or security breaches could disrupt our business.

catalysts.event: Merger with UWM Holdings Corporation expected to close
catalysts.sentence: The Merger is expected to close in the second quarter of 2026, subject to our common stockholders approval and the satisfaction of other closing conditions, including customary regulatory approvals.
